description: 微信小程序 AI Skill 注册表 — 列出已知的 Skill 仓库

skills.name: drink-skill

skills.name: order-skill

skills.name: hospital-skill
skills.description: 医院挂号 — 搜医院科室、挂号、查记录

skills.name: taxi-skill
skills.description: 出行打车 — 预估价格、叫车、查行程

skills.name: travel-skill
skills.description: 旅行规划 — 搜目的地、规划行程、查天气

skills.name: shopping-skill
skills.description: 潮玩购物 — 搜商品、查库存、下单

skills.name: bill-skill
skills.description: 生活缴费 — 查账单、缴费、查历史

skills.name: party-skill
skills.description: 聚会安排 — 创建活动、推荐场所、邀请好友

skills.name: queue-skill
skills.description: 排队取号 — 搜门店、取号、查进度

skills.name: todolist-skill
skills.description: 简单待办 — 增删改查、展示列表

skills.name: water-tracker
skills.description: 喝水记录 — 记录饮水、查看历史

skills.name: payment-skill
